name: SCP-079 (The Old Ai)
description:
Rude piece of shit Ai! Don't move him to a better computer, he doesn't deserve it.

Just wants to see 682 again.

If you really want to fuck him, you have to use a USB and slide it in and out of his USB port. Your welcome.

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: Grabbed from here
creator: eldritchspider
